subcodes.first_line: At dawn, with wondrous and melodious voices, they will be engaged in the mention of God. Ships carrying the flag of “Yá Bahá’u’l-Abhá!” will anchor at the port [of Haifa] and kings will disembark
subcodes.subjects: @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @Shrines and Holy places, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
